acceptanceReviewed.criterion: LAN video smoke logs retain stable TCP smoke identity and validation tokens.
LAN video smoke result.json keeps productQuic false, transport tcp, payload/hash validation, and explicit nonClaims.
Timeline artifacts are sequence-only and do not imply latency proof.
The node scope excludes live LAN, product QUIC, decode/render/presentation, latency, workflow dispatch, credentials, and PR #49 changes.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Artifact-writer contract tests use synthetic Rust summaries and do not require live LAN hardware, Mac validation, product QUIC, VideoToolbox, Metal, presentation, latency measurement, workflow_dispatch, credentials, or PR #49 changes.
